content.en:
This Heavenly Dao Guardian was very powerful, and Ye Tian felt that even if he could defeat this Heavenly Dao Guardian, he would have to pay a certain price.

After all, this Heavenly Dao Guardian is very extraordinary, not comparable to the previous Heavenly Dao Guardian.

"Although I can pretend to be defeated and go out to fool Yama San, this is not good, and Yama San also helps me a lot, it is too uninteresting to do so!

Ye Tian secretly planned.

Rumble!!!

The Heavenly Dao Guardian made a move, and a punch slammed into Ye Tian.

"Slash!"

Ye Tian unleashed the Heavenly Moon Knife, and the sword collided with the fist of the Heavenly Dao Guardian.

In an instant, Ye Tian was knocked out, and his body was extremely sore.

"It's so strong!"

Ye Tian was slightly surprised.

This Heavenly Dao Guardian contains the power of the Heavenly Dao, breaking through ten thousand laws with one punch, and there are not too many fancy movements, not even the power of the law, but the power of the Heavenly Dao of the Void Realm, crushing all the laws of the Void Realm.

Fortunately, it was Ye Tian, if it was someone else, his physical body would definitely not be able to withstand the impact of the Heavenly Dao, and he would be crushed in an instant.

A powerful physical body is the capital for Ye Tian to fight with the Heavenly Dao Guardian, otherwise he would not dare to fight with such a Heavenly Dao Guardian.

Boom Boom Boom !!

Ye Tian and the Heavenly Dao Guardian continued to fight, and Ye Tian also used the Ten Thousand Realms Divine Power, turning into a double enchantment to resist attacks.

It's just that a divine power like the Ten Thousand Realms has also been suppressed here, otherwise Ye Tian wouldn't have worked so hard!

"Chaos Palm!"

"Mixed Element Scale Armor!"

"Mixed Element Vine!"

Ye Tian used a variety of methods, although these methods are difficult to exert real power, but they can still exert a certain attack effect.

Although it was difficult for Ye Tian to defeat the Heavenly Dao Guardian, it was also difficult for this Heavenly Dao Guardian to really hurt Ye Tian.

Time dragged on like this, and time passed slowly.

"No, you can't defeat this Heavenly Dao Guardian if you go on like this, it's too powerful, and its power comes from Heavenly Dao, it's almost endless. "

Ye Tian thought about it like this, and immediately flew away.

When Ye Tian flew away, the Heavenly Dao Guardian merged into the light cluster again and disappeared.

Soon, Ye Tian returned to this golden lake.

However, this time Ye Tian didn't touch the light cluster.

When he couldn't defeat that Heavenly Dao Guardian, he couldn't take away the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart in the Light Cluster, and touching the Light Regiment was to make trouble for himself.

At this time, Ye Tian's eyes were staring at the golden lake.

"The liquid substance in this lake is absolutely a treasure, I don't know what it is?"

Ye Tian was curious, took a little liquid substance, and then hesitated for a while, then swallowed it in one gulp.

It was very dangerous to do so, but Ye Tian felt that since this liquid substance was a kind of energy, it might be helpful for cultivation.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying energy erupted in Ye Tian's body, causing Ye Tian to hurriedly run the Chaos Refining Body Technique and start refining.

Although there is no way to continue cultivating the Chaos Body Refining Technique, it is also very good as a refining method.

But even the refining of the Chaos Body Refining Technique didn't seem to be able to completely absorb the energy of these liquid substances, and if he didn't want to absorb it, Ye Tian's body would probably not be able to withstand it.

So, Ye Tian thought of the fourth set of actions of the Eighteen Golden Body Formula.

Now, Ye Tian has only preliminarily practiced this fourth set of movements, far from cultivating it to the consummation realm, he is ready to try to cultivate the fourth set of movements, and see if the fourth set of movements can help him digest the energy in his body.

Wow!

Ye Tian posed the fourth set of movements, and ran the fourth set of exercises.

Rumble!!!

The pressure of terror attacked, and this was the pressure generated by the confrontation between the Eighteen Golden Bodies and Heaven and Earth.

Ye Tian didn't understand how this pressure came from before, but now it is clear.

To put it simply, the Eighteen Golden Body Recipe is a method against the heavens, using the confrontation with heaven and earth to let heaven and earth suppress him, so as to break the restrictions again and again and improve the strength of the physical body.

And when fighting against heaven and earth, the physical body is under unimaginable pressure, and the body cells consume energy quickly, and the speed of absorbing energy is also incomparably fast.

Therefore, the effect of the Eighteen Golden Body Recipes in absorbing energy is very good!

At this time, Ye Tian had already made the fourth set of moves, and the energy in his body was being consumed rapidly.

In addition, Ye Tian was shocked to find that he had been persisting for a long time.

"This golden liquid substance has a cultivation promotion effect on my Eighteen Golden Body Technique. Maybe I can use these golden liquid substances to cultivate the fourth set of movements to the consummation realm, and at that time, the strength of my physical body will skyrocket, and I may be able to beat that Heavenly Dao Guardian!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

At the same time, he also gave this golden liquid substance a name - Heavenly Dao Gold Liquid!

Immediately, Ye Tian took out some Heavenly Dao Golden Liquid, absorbed and refined, and cultivated the fourth set of actions of the Eighteen Golden Body Technique.

Of course, Ye Tian also turned on the time acceleration, which could shorten the time, otherwise if he cultivated here for too long, the Yama San outside would be impatient and leave here, then he would be in trouble.

While Ye Tian completely ignored the effect of the Heavenly Dao Golden Liquid and cultivated frantically, Ye Tian's physical strength increased at a speed visible to the naked eye.

Time passed.

In the blink of an eye, half a month has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already refined a lot of Heavenly Dao gold liquid, but compared to the entire Heavenly Dao gold liquid lake, this Heavenly Dao gold liquid was nothing.

"The fourth set of moves is finally complete!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

At this time, the strength of his physical body far exceeded before, reaching an incredible level.

It can even be said that if he doesn't activate his defensive talent and other defensive means, the whole person is standing here, and those god-level ninth-order powerhouses can't break his physical body.

"Now, my strength should be enough to defeat that Heavenly Dao Guardian!"

Ye Tian estimated.

So, he flew in front of the light group and touched it.

Rumble!!!!

The Heavenly Dao Guardian appeared, and after seeing Ye Tian, he immediately attacked.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian unleashed the Chaos Palm and bombarded it with one palm.

Under the powerful physical strength and the amplification of the Chaos Divine Codex Secret Technique, the power of Ye Tian's palm reached a terrifying level.

The Heavenly Dao Guardian tried to punch Ye Tian with one punch, but after the collision of one punch and one palm, the Heavenly Dao Guardian himself was knocked away and hit the light cluster, causing a huge shock wave.

"The Heavenly Dao Guardian is injured!"

Ye Tian clearly sensed that the armor on the Heavenly Dao Guardian's body had cracked, and his aura had begun to weaken a little.

Obviously, Ye Tian's current strength was already above this Heavenly Dao Guardian.

Thundered!!!!

The fierce battle begins!

Under Ye Tian's repeated attacks, the Heavenly Dao Guardian was constantly injured, although with the blessing of the Heavenly Dao, the strength was endless, but the injury did not have time to recover.

Half an hour later, Ye Tian's Heavenly Moon Knife completely shattered the Heavenly Dao Guardian, turning it into a point of light and dissipating.

At the same time, the light cluster on the lake also dissipated, leaving only the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart floating there.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian was very excited and flew in front of Tiandao Mu Xin and grabbed Tiandao Mu Xin.

It's just that the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart is still connected with the Heavenly Dao Tree, and Ye Tian pulls the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart with all his might, pulling it into the Void Realm little by little.

Under such a pull, the Heavenly Dao Tree began to tremble.

Outside.

Yama San has always maintained the state of trapping the Great Elder of the Void Demon Clan, and although the other Void Demon Clan has recovered, they can't help Yama San, and they are constantly being knocked away, and they can't help Yama San at all.

But these demons are not afraid of death, and keep attacking and attacking, as if they were tireless machines.

Suddenly.

Yamasan looked at the Heavenly Dao Tree that was constantly shaking, and was suddenly surprised: "This ...... It won't be that Ye Yi succeeded in obtaining the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart, I only heard that our ancestors once used the Great Secret Treasure to succeed in that one time, and obtained the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart, and the descendants never succeeded again. Up to now, the Heavenly Dao Wooden Heart has become a legend, and I didn't expect Ye Yi to succeed in obtaining the Heavenly Dao Wooden Heart, just trying, I didn't expect ......"

The powerhouses of the Void Demon Clan were also panicked, the Heavenly Dao Tree was their foundation, and nothing could happen to them!

But the Heavenly Dao space is not so easy to enter, they do not have god-level space talents, they must use special methods, and they can only send their clansmen in after preparing for a long time.

And now, they are fighting the enemy, where is the time to prepare!

......

"Finally in!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief, he took the Heavenly Dao Wooden Heart into the Portable Void Realm, which was equivalent to successfully taking the Heavenly Dao Wooden Heart away.

"And Heavenly Dao Golden Liquid!"

Ye Tian's gaze looked at the golden lake.

With so much Heavenly Dao gold liquid, it is definitely a treasure!

Other people can't improve the strength of their physical bodies after the god level, these Heavenly Dao gold liquids are just energy things similar to divine crystals in their eyes, but in Ye Tian's eyes, they are supreme treasures that can improve their physical bodies!

Immediately, Ye Tian took out a space storage bottle and quickly collected the Heavenly Dao Gold Liquid!

However, when the Heavenly Dao Gold Liquid had been collected by a third of the lake, it could no longer be collected.

"Heavenly Dao gold liquid should be one of the foundations of the Heavenly Dao Tree, similar to the origin, if all of them are collected, the Heavenly Dao Tree is estimated to be dead, and the Heavenly Dao Tree's self-protection system makes it impossible for outsiders to take away the rest of the Heavenly Dao Golden Liquid!"

Ye Tian guessed.

He tried several methods, no matter how he took the Heavenly Dao gold liquid, a force would appear to stop him.

In desperation, Ye Tian could only give up this plan!

Anyway, he had already taken a third of the Heavenly Dao Golden Liquid, and so much Heavenly Dao Golden Liquid was enough for Ye Tian to cultivate for a long time.

"It's time to leave the Heavenly Dao Space!"

Ye Tian released the suppressed void demon in the Void Mina Realm in his palm, and immediately fluctuated along the space and left the Heavenly Dao space.
